query: LPS stimulated human PBMC cytokine production perturbation screen

papers.title: Direct stimulation of cytokines (IL-1 beta, TNF-alpha, IL-6, IL-2, IFN-gamma and GM-CSF) in whole blood. I. Comparison with isolated PBMC stimulation
papers.authors: D De Groote; P.F. Zangerle; Y. Gevaert; Marie France Fassotte; Yves Beguin; F. Noizat-Pirenne; Jacques Pirenne; R. Gathy; M. Lopez; I. Dehart; D. Igot; M. Baudrihaye; Dominique L. Delacroix; P Franchimont
papers.categories: Peripheral blood mononuclear cell; Cytokine; Tumor necrosis factor alpha; Lipopolysaccharide; Interleukin

papers.title: LPS-induced IL-8 production from human PBMC is dependent on an intermediate role for IL-1
LPS-induced release of IL-1 beta, IL-6, IL-8, TNF-alpha and sCD14 in whole blood and PBMC from persons with high or low levels of HDL-lipoprotein
papers.authors: Jan Bertil Eggesbo; Ingvar Hjermann; Per Kristian Lund; Gun Britt Joo; Reidun Ovstebo; Peter Kierulf

papers.title: Mini-Factor H Modulates Complement-Dependent IL-6 and IL-10 Release in an Immune Cell Culture (PBMC) Model: Potential Benefits Against Cytokine Storm
papers.authors: G. Kozma; T. Meszaros; Tamas Bakos; M. Hennies; D. Bencze; B. Uzonyi; Balazs Gyorffy; Edward Cedrone; M. Dobrovolskaia; M. Jozsi; J. Szebeni
papers.abstract: We used peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) cultured in the presence of autologous serum to test the impact of complement activation and inhibition on cytokine release, testing the effects of liposomal amphotericin B (AmBisome), zymosan and bacterial lipopolysaccharide (LPS) as immune activators.

papers.title: Differential cytokine modulation and T cell activation by two distinct classes of thalidomide analogues that are potent inhibitors of TNF-alpha.
papers.authors: Laura G. Corral; Patrick Haslett; George W. Muller; R Chen; Lai Mun Wong; Christopher Ocampo; Rebecca T. Patterson; David Stirling; Gilla Kaplan
papers.abstract: The tested compounds inhibited TNF-alpha, IL-1 beta, and IL-6 and greatly increased IL-10 production by LPS-induced PBMC. Similar to thalidomide, the effect of these agents on IL-12 production was dichotomous; IL-12 was inhibited when PBMC were stimulated with LPS but increased when cells were stimulated by cross-linking the TCR.
papers.categories: Thalidomide; Cytokine; Tumor necrosis factor alpha; Pharmacology; Peripheral blood mononuclear cell

papers.title: Cannabinoid receptor-2 ligand beta-caryophyllene modulates inflammatory responses of bovine peripheral blood mononuclear cells in vitro.
papers.authors: Butenko Y; Shattenstein B; Dos Santos Silva P; Hubner L; Portnick Y; Levin Y; Zachut M
papers.abstract: PBMC from each cow were assigned to controls or BCP-supplemented and incubated in thermoneutral or heat stress conditions. Then, half of the cells from each cow were treated with lipopolysaccharide (LPS), and media were collected for analysis of cytokines/chemokines.
papers.keywords: Monocytes; Heat stress; Immune; Dairy cows
